'''norabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubberised|rubberised]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-r-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubberised|rubberised]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| norabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:norabithi|norabithi]] || [[word:norabiji|norabiji]] || [[word:norabishi|norabishi]] || [[word:norabiki|norabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:norabuthuthu|norabuthuthu]] || [[word:norabujuju|norabujuju]] || [[word:norabushushu|norabushushu]] || [[word:norabukuku|norabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:norabuthu|norabuthu]] || [[word:norabuju|norabuju]] || [[word:norabushu|norabushu]] || [[word:norabuku|norabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:norabufthuf|norabufthuf]] || [[word:norabufjuf|norabufjuf]] || [[word:norabufshuf|norabufshuf]] || [[word:norabufkuf|norabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:norabethe|norabethe]] || [[word:norabeje|norabeje]] || [[word:norabeshe|norabeshe]] || [[word:norabeke|norabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:norabothotho|norabothotho]] || [[word:norabojojo|norabojojo]] || [[word:noraboshosho|noraboshosho]] || [[word:norabokoko|norabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:norabotho|norabotho]] || [[word:norabojo|norabojo]] || [[word:norabosho|norabosho]] || [[word:noraboko|noraboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:norabofthof|norabofthof]] || [[word:norabofjof|norabofjof]] || [[word:norabofshof|norabofshof]] || [[word:norabofkof|norabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:norabÃŸfthÃŸf|norabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:norabÃŸfjÃŸf|norabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:norabÃŸfshÃŸf|norabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:norabÃŸfkÃŸf|norabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:norabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|norabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:norabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|norabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:norabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|norabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:norabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|norabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:norabÃŸfthÃŸf|norabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:norabÃŸfjÃŸf|norabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:norabÃŸfshÃŸf|norabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:norabÃŸfkÃŸf|norabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:norabÃŸfthÃŸf|norabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:norabÃŸfjÃŸf|norabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:norabÃŸfshÃŸf|norabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:norabÃŸfkÃŸf|norabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:norabÃḊthÃḊ|norabÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:norabÃḊjÃḊ|norabÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:norabÃḊshÃḊ|norabÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:norabÃḊkÃḊ|norabÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:norabathatha|norabathatha]] || [[word:norabajaja|norabajaja]] || [[word:norabashasha|norabashasha]] || [[word:norabakaka|norabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:norabatha|norabatha]] || [[word:norabaja|norabaja]] || [[word:norabasha|norabasha]] || [[word:norabaka|norabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:norabafthaf|norabafthaf]] || [[word:norabafjaf|norabafjaf]] || [[word:norabafshaf|norabafshaf]] || [[word:norabafkaf|norabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:norabasha|norabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:norabshÃḋsha|norabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:norabrosha|norabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:norabmusha|norabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:norabyasha|norabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonorabnkshÃḋsha|gonorabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonorabnkrosha|gonorabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonorabnkmusha|gonorabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonorabnkyasha|gonorabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:norarabasha|norarabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:norarabshÃḋsha|norarabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:norarabrosha|norarabrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:norarabmusha|norarabmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:norarabyasha|norarabyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonorarabnkshÃḋsha|gonorarabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonorarabnkrosha|gonorarabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonorarabnkmusha|gonorarabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonorarabnkyasha|gonorarabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nerÃḊbasha|nerÃḊbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nerÃḊbshÃḋsha|nerÃḊbshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nerÃḊbrosha|nerÃḊbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nerÃḊbmusha|nerÃḊbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nerÃḊbyasha|nerÃḊbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonerÃḊbnkshÃḋsha|gonerÃḊbnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonerÃḊbnkrosha|gonerÃḊbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonerÃḊbnkmusha|gonerÃḊbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonerÃḊbnkyasha|gonerÃḊbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:norfabasha|norfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:norfabshÃḋsha|norfabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:norfabrosha|norfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:norfabmusha|norfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:norfabyasha|norfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonorfabnkshÃḋsha|gonorfabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonorfabnkrosha|gonorfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonorfabnkmusha|gonorfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonorfabnkyasha|gonorfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
